name: Brutal Beast Battle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>烈</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>な<ruby lang="jp"><rb>争</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あらそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: If a player controls 2 or more monsters of the same card type (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link), they must send some to the GY so they control no more than 1 monster of that card type. Then, each player that sent a monster to the GY for this effect draws cards equal to the number of different card types (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link) they control. You can only activate 1 "Brutal Beast Battle" per turn.
eff: If a player controls 2 or more monsters of the same card type (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link), they must send some to the GY so they control no more than 1 monster of that card type. Then, each player that sent a monster to the GY for this effect draws cards equal to the number of different card types (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link) they control. You can only activate 1 "Brutal Beast Battle" per turn.

action: Makes the player send from the field to the Graveyard
Makes your opponent send from the field to the Graveyard
